subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-02-26 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: The Will of God is that these ideals should be promoted. It is certain that anyone who arises to promote them shall be aided
subcodes.first_line_orig: ارادهٴ الهیه بظهور ترویج این امور تعلق گرفته البته هر کس بر نشر این آثار قیام کند مؤید می‌شود
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @universal peace; world unity, @free will and predestination; fate
